title: Zhuangzi, Chapter 18: Supreme Happiness
description: Chapter 18 of the Zhuangzi — the Taoist masterpiece of paradox and parable.
introduction: Chapter 18 of the Zhuangzi — the Taoist masterpiece of paradox and parable.

translation.text: Is there such a thing as supreme happiness in the world? Is there a way to keep yourself alive? If so, what do you do, what do you rely on, what do you avoid, what do you stick by, what do you follow, what do you leave alone, what do you find happiness in, what do you find dread of?
